title: Empty URLs accepted by /shorten
body: handleShorten saves a short code even when the request URL is empty, creating dead links. Validate the URL before saving.

title: Short codes are sequential and guessable
body: Save() produces c1, c2, c3... so codes are enumerable. Use the base36 Encode helper with a salt instead.

title: Redirect returns 302 for unknown codes intermittently
body: handleRedirect should always 404 for unknown codes; confirm the ok check covers trailing slashes.

title: No health check route
body: Add a /healthz route in routes() for load-balancer liveness checks.

title: Store has no expiry for old links
body: MemoryStore never evicts URLs, so memory grows unbounded. Add TTL-based eviction.

title: Server ignores request method on /shorten
body: handleShorten accepts GET as well as POST. Reject non-POST with 405.

title: main does not read port from env
body: The port is hardcoded to :8080. Read PORT from the environment with a fallback.
